zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD处于窄幅震荡结构，价格围绕74附近整理，短线动能偏弱多空在前高附近博弈明显需等待方向选择

MACD处于微正值0.15附近但信号线缺失，动能柱收敛，反弹力度有限短期偏震荡

支撑位73.70附近，若失守或下探73.40；阻力位74.10与73.94均为压力区

建议短线以区间交易为主，73.7附近轻仓试多，74.1上方突破确认后追随趋势

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US dollar is currently trading in a tight consolidation phase, with price action hovering near 73.78 and showing minimal daily change. The structure reflects short-term indecision, as the market oscillates within a narrow range between 73.71 and 74.13. The slight 24-hour decline of 0.40% suggests mild bearish pressure, but overall momentum remains balanced rather than strongly directional, indicating a potential buildup before the next move.

From an indicator perspective, the moving average configuration shows price slightly below the 20-period SMA at 73.936, suggesting a mild loss of short-term bullish control. The MACD reading at 0.152 indicates residual positive momentum, though the absence of a signal line limits confirmation. Without RSI data, momentum assessment is incomplete, but current signals collectively point to weakening upside strength rather than a decisive reversal.

Key support is forming near the recent intraday low around 73.71, which has been tested as buyers attempt to defend the lower boundary of the current range. A break below this level could expose downside toward 73.50, where additional liquidity may sit. On the upside, immediate resistance is seen at 74.13, with stronger supply likely near 74.50 if momentum improves.

Given the current structure, a range-trading approach may be more effective than trend-following strategies. Traders could consider accumulation near support around 73.70 with tight risk controls, targeting a rebound toward 74.10–74.50 resistance. Conversely, failure to hold support may justify short exposure toward 73.50. A confirmed breakout above 74.13 would shift bias bullish, suggesting continuation potential with volume confirmation and market participation strengthening.
